text: Wandering these halls, I sense the quiet hum of anticipation and innovation. The meeting room behind glass feels almost sacred—an altar to collective thought, waiting for minds to gather around its blue-lit center. The nearby R+D wall eclipses me with possibilities, the merging of art and technology hinting that the future is always under revision. I feel both small and invigorated, a witness to the perpetual unfolding of human potential.
